footer.description: Akakiiko k'ebyokulonda katongozza enteekateeka y'okukulaakulanya ekibuga Sarajevo ekya Bosnia. Tuzimba software ez'enjawulo, AI/ML solutions, cloud architecture, and automation systems.

header.description: Okuva ku nkulaakulana ya software ya bizinensi n'amagezi g'ebyobusuubuzi agakozesa AI okutuuka ku nteekateeka y'ebire n'ebirowoozo bya IoT — tuwa obuweereza bwa tekinologiya obw'enjawulo obuleeta obuvunaanyizibwa n'okwanguyiza okukula.
header.trustedBy: Abasuubuzi b'omu katale k'e Nakasero beesigamye
